ratings.comment: This class is primarily discussion based which makes it quite engaging and although there is a lot of reading Professor Wodzynski is very passionate about Polish literature which makes the class super interesting.  The homework is mainly short writing that proves completion of the readings along with some fun presentations.

I took Prof. Wodzinski's course Spring 22' for Littrans 247. Very lecture/Discussion heavy but very knowledgeable in this topic and great speaker. Take this course if you really want to go in depth about topics and be prepared to participate.
